overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking along a foggy wooden harbor dock at dawn. The character passes moored sailing ships and dock workers before stopping to observe the misty water with steamboats visible in the distance, then continues walking into the golden fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden harbor dock with moored sailing vessels

events.description: NPC in cowboy hat passes close to camera on the right, temporarily blocking view
large sailing ship passes out of view as dock curves toward open water

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock, passing NPCs and a large moored sailboat

notable_agents.action: man in hat standing near the sailboat rigging looking at the vessel
dock worker walking along the planks carrying goods

entered.detail: tall masted wooden sailing vessel with rigging moored at the dock
weathered wooden planks of the harbor walkway
wooden bollards used for tying boats
large steam-powered vessel visible through the morning fog
stacked wooden cargo barrels on the dock edge
small wooden boat floating near the dock pilings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden harbor dock enveloped in thick morning fog. A large sailing ship dominates the right side of the frame while dock workers move about. The camera passes close to an NPC in a hat before the sailboat exits view as the dock curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dock overlook with wooden retaining wall

events.description: character stops walking and stands still to observe the foggy harbor
sun breaks through the fog creating a strong golden backlight effect

agents.ego_description: standing at the dock edge looking out at the misty water and distant steamboats

entered.detail: angled wooden bulkhead supporting the dock edge
elevated water tank structure on the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a wider view of the harbor as the character stops to observe. A wooden retaining wall lines the left side while a water tower rises in the distance. The sun breaks through the fog, creating a golden backlight as the character stands silhouetted against the misty water.

scene_state.functional_zone: weathered dock extending into foggy harbor

events.description: character turns and walks away from camera, moving deeper into the fog
character disappears into the fog, leaving only the empty dock and water

agents.ego_description: walking away from the camera along the dock, silhouetted against the golden fog before disappearing from view

entered.detail: broken and sagging wooden planks of the damaged dock edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the camera into the dense fog, becoming a silhouette before disappearing completely. The camera continues along the weathered dock, passing a collapsed section of planks, with the steamboat still visible in the misty distance and the retaining wall fading into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy harbor dock that transforms from a crowded industrial walkway into a vast, golden misty expanse. It begins by following a character through thick morning fog past a large sailing ship and active dock workers, moving close to a man in a hat before the dock curves and the ship exits the frame. As the view opens up, the character pauses beside a wooden retaining wall, and the lighting shifts as the sun breaks through the haze to create a golden backlight. The scene then transitions as the character walks away from the camera, becoming a silhouette before disappearing entirely into the dense fog. Finally, the camera continues forward over weathered planks and a collapsed section of the dock, leaving the retaining wall behind while a distant steamboat lingers in the mist.
